today.subtitle: Here are today's reminders, all in one place.
today.empty_message: No reminders in the next two days. Add a medication to get started.

medications.empty_message: Tap the button below to add your first medication and reminder.

medication_detail.snooze_override_hint: Adjust per-medication snooze behaviour in a future update; currently it follows the global Settings unless an override row exists.

schedule.pattern_hint: Pick a preset, or tap days to toggle take (●) / skip (○).

confirm.title: Confirm dose
confirm.note_placeholder: e.g. felt nauseous, took with food
confirm.taken_hint: Logs the dose and stops reminders
confirm.skipped_hint: Logs a skip; reminders continue until taken
confirm.later_hint: Reminds you again after the snooze interval
confirm.missing_message: This dose could not be found — it may have been removed.
confirm.result_next: Okay — we'll remind you again at {{time}}.
confirm.result_capped: Logged. The snooze limit was reached, so no more reminders for this dose.

history.empty_message: Confirm a dose and it will appear here.

settings.max_repeats_hint: Hard cap that prevents endless reminders
settings.quiet_enable_hint: Reminders inside this window are de-emphasised
settings.biometric_hint: Require Face ID / fingerprint to open the app
settings.privacy_note: Dosely runs fully offline. All medication data is stored in an on-device database; sensitive flags use the OS keychain. Nothing is uploaded unless you explicitly export a file.

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings.
language.rtl_note: The app will switch to right-to-left layout.
language.restart_message: Dosely needs to restart to apply the new language.

onboarding.language_body: Before we start, pick your preferred language.
onboarding.welcome_body: Never miss a dose. Schedule your medications, get reminded on time, and keep an honest history of every dose — all stored privately on this device.
onboarding.model_body: When a reminder fires you choose: "Taken" logs the dose and stops reminders. "Skipped" or "Later" keep nudging you every 30 minutes (up to 6 times) until you take it.
onboarding.notifications_body: Dosely needs notification permission to remind you. Reminders are local to this device — nothing is sent to a server.

export.note: The exported file includes every logged dose in the selected range plus an adherence summary. It is created locally and shared through your device's share sheet — nothing is uploaded automatically.

alerts.cancel_series_message: This will cancel {{count}}+ upcoming reminders for {{name}}. Past history is kept. This cannot be undone.
alerts.delete_med_message: {{name}} and its schedule will be removed. History logs are kept for your records.
